title: Exoskeleton armor
description: Exoskeleton armor with thermal imaging and incremental jump boost.
body:
Exo adds an exoskeleton-like armor that allows to jump higher the longer the jump is charged (max 2 seconds, custom keybind) and to activate the thermal imaging mode (custom keybind). 

**Jump boost:**
The longer you press and hold the keybind, the higher you will jump. The charge stops increasing the upward launch at 2 seconds. The max jump height is about 10 blocks. Lateral momentum is conserved.

**Thermal imaging:**
All entities are highlighted with a bright white and the rest of the world will appear as a grayscale. This makes finding mobs very easy. Note that shaders might impact this effect.
![Scene without thermal imaging.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8f82b98ebd0f4c0da78ac0859e7d53cc577aff3_0.webp)
![Scene with thermal imaging.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35b7309a5fbf6a8505586f7a4c9dadce5a36c1ec.png)

**Other armor attributes:**
Boots: Negate all fall damage.
Leggings: Grant launch (incremental jump) ability and give speed boost 1.
Chest: Gives strength 2 and haste 2.
Helmet: Grants thermal imaging ability.

The protection value of the armor is significantly higher than netherite.

The mod is client-side.
There is no config file yet.



Please credit me if you plan on distributing content containing this mod.
